wordplay_note: Stripped to the bone — his cover identity is skeletal
card_description: Baynes (Mr.) (meaning "Baynes = bones / the essential") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Man in the High Castle*. Cover identity of Wegener as a Swedish businessman in San Francisco. Name note: Stripped to the bone — his cover identity is skeletal. Identity as disguise — every character performs a false self. First appears in *The Man in the High Castle*.
first_work: The Man in the High Castle
work_list: The Man in the High Castle
